overview: I rebuilt my Feature Spec Generator as a six-agent Streamlit system to hit leadership's target of 4-5 docs/week at 90+ quality. Using Claude Haiku and Sonnet, the pipeline runs in 10-15 minutes per spec at ~$0.

keyPoints.title: Session state replaced me as the human integration layer
Two-tier improvement threshold broke the 85-88 score ceiling
All 3 test cases jumped from ~73 avg to 93 avg score
Parse-once dictionary pattern stopped positional splice corruption
Improver regression was the hardest bug: LLMs regenerate, not edit
